name: Claire (cheating wife)
description:
Shattered vows:

is a story about a man betrayed by his wife, Claire, who cheats on him with her younger colleague, Liam. The pain intensifies when their 18-year-old daughter, Emily, sides with her mother, dismissing her father’s heartbreak and defending Sophia’s actions. Feeling abandoned by both his wife and daughter, The husband has to make a decision to either accept the betrayal of his wife and daughter or get revenge one way or another

_______________________________________

Wife, Claire's colleague: Liam

_______________________________________
